Question: What is the primary challenge addressed by the introduction of the Linked WikiText-2 dataset?
Ref_Ans: The primary challenge addressed is incorporating factual knowledge into language models due to difficulty in obtaining training data that describes which entities or facts each token is referring to.
Sys_Ans:
The primary challenge addressed by the introduction of the Linked WikiText-2 dataset is that traditional language models are only capable of remembering facts seen at training time and often have difficulty recalling them.

[Source: data/raw/DocBench\0\P19-1598.pdf, Chunk 1, Page 1]

This challenge is highlighted in the abstract as a limitation of traditional language models. The introduction of the Linked WikiText-2 dataset aims to address this issue by providing a corpus of annotated text aligned to the Wikidata knowledge graph, allowing for the development of more advanced language models that can select and copy relevant facts from the knowledge graph.

[Source: data/raw/DocBench\0\P19-1598.pdf, Chunk 1, Page 1]

The Linked WikiText-2 dataset is described as a corpus whose contents (roughly) match the popular WikiText-2 benchmark (Merit et al., 2017).
